title: Green Escape in North Bandung
description: Located in Bandung’s cooler, higher‑elevation district, Sukajadi Hotel offers a refreshing stay surrounded by greenery. Just minutes from PVJ, cafés, and reflexology centers, it’s the perfect blend of nature, comfort, and city convenience.

title: Your Gateway to Lembang’s Nature
description: Set along the route to Lembang, Sukajadi Hotel sits in one of Bandung’s breezier, greener areas. Enjoy easy access to nature attractions while staying close to PVJ, shopping streets, and local wellness spots.

title: A Breezy Poolside Hangout
description: With gazebos, shaded seating, and a refreshing open‑air setting, our pool area is ideal for families and leisure travellers. Guests can bring in nearby street food and enjoy a relaxed Bandung dining experience by the water.

title: Grand Convention Halls
description: Designed with elegant high ceilings and classic colonial‑style architecture, our event spaces offer a bright, airy atmosphere ideal for weddings, celebrations, and corporate gatherings. Guests can enjoy naturally ventilated or fully air‑conditioned settings, creating a flexible and comfortable venue that brings timeless Bandung charm to every occasion.

title: Spacious Halls for Every Occasion
description: Our event spaces offer high ceilings, bright open layouts, and a warm Indonesian atmosphere ideal for weddings, family celebrations, and corporate gatherings. With flexible natural or air‑conditioned settings, Sukajadi provides a comfortable venue for events of all sizes.

title: Comfortable Rooms for Families and Groups
description: Designed for flexibility and ease, our family‑friendly rooms offer generous space for parents, children, and extended families. With practical multi‑bed options and larger layouts, Sukajadi provides a warm, relaxed environment that makes every stay comfortable and convenient.
